name: Matter Paneer (Panir with Peas)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Peas (Frozen Or If They Are Fresh, Get The Small, Sweet Variety)
3 Tablespoons Mix Of Ghee And Oil
1 Cup Canned Tomatoes Or Finely Chopped Tomatoes
1/4 Cup Fresh Chopped Coriander, To Garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the paneer into small cubes and fry on medium heat until they turn a nice golden color. Drain on kitchen paper and set aside.
2. In a heavy saucepan, gently heat the ghee/oil. Add the cinnamon sticks when hot, then add the cumin seeds and let them pop. Add the ginger, garlic, and onions. Sauté on medium heat until soft.
3. Add the chili powder, garam masala, turmeric powder, salt, jeera powder, canned tomatoes (or finely chopped tomatoes), tomato puree, and fresh chilies. Cook until all ingredients blend together into a runny paste.
4. Add the peas and simmer until cooked in the gravy. If the gravy is too thick, add a little water or tomato juice from canned tomatoes.
5. Once the peas are cooked, add the fried paneer cubes and simmer for an additional 5 to 6 minutes.
6. Garnish with fresh coriander and serve hot with naan bread or parathas.
